# AWARTS

AWARTS is the Strava for AI Coding, built by Harshal Jain (@harryy).

AWARTS helps developers track, analyze, and share their AI-assisted coding usage across Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Antigravity.

Key features:
- AI coding usage tracking
- Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Antigravity support
- Global leaderboards
- Coding streaks
- Privacy-first local tracking
- Lightweight CLI daemon
- Social developer profiles

Website: https://awarts.club
App: https://awarts.club/feed
GitHub: https://github.com/HarshalJain-cs/AWARTS

Founder: Harshal Jain
Category: AI developer tools, AI coding analytics, coding productivity, AI-assisted development tracking
